As I said on my Yelp review...

My bankruptcy (BK) case has been discharged as of yesterday!

Before I filed for bankruptcy I always felt like I was always short on money, there just never seemed to be enough or I was always struggling even when I was working full-time. I felt like I was always on a budget. While some of my debts were my fault, it came to the point where I was just making payments on interest and not the debt itself. It came to a point where I just couldn't make payments on some of my debts and they just piled on top of each other. I started feeling helpless and I just had to push some of it to the back of my mind or it would have driven me crazy.

It all came to a head when I got a court summons from a collection agency for the amount of $2,000. I can't even begin to imagine the dread and apprehension that one experiences when you get one of those summonses. I always thought that only happened in movies or TV shows. Panic set in. My coworker had always been suggesting filing for BK, but I always felt like it was cheating or failing. But when push comes to shove, I felt that I had to take care of myself. Greg helped me take care of this.

I got a few suggestions, but Beverly Hills was just way too far for me. I found Greg on Yelp after looking at a few others, his ratings were consistent and this impressed me. I set up an appointment, it was easy. He will walk you through everything with clear directions and updates and he will answer any questions you might have promptly. The process itself is long, I filed in October and was only cleared yesterday February, but the hardest in all of that is just taking the first step and reaching out for assistance. Greg helped me with everything, and even just the fact that someone can tell you "everything will be OK" will take a huge load of stress off your back. Even just after the first session and I found out that I actually qualified for BK, after I left his office, I felt 1,000 lbs lighter.

If you're struggling with your bills and legitimately can't catch up with the payments, don't be afraid to reach out and ask for help. If you have any questions for me, feel free to private message me. Don't let that pretty face fool you, give Greg a call and see if he can assist.

Do your research before hiring an attorney because not only are they expensive they will act like they care when they really don't they are just out for the money than helping you. Both Anthony and Monica were very helpful and key in what I considered to be a very difficult situation - being charged with a first offense misdemeanor DUI in a different state, many miles from home.  The whole process was entirely new to me and a complete shocker - I still vividly remember leaving the station with a feeling of complete helplessness, shame, and defeat.  I blew under on the roadside and at the station but it didn't matter, I was still being charged with a DUI.  The officers told me the breathalyzer was "science," so as to imply that their decision was unquestionable, that their handheld device determined with certainty that I was a convict.

After arranging for a new flight home the following morning after being released (I was arrested and missed my flight the following morning) I scrambled and called every lawyer I could and did as much information gathering as possible.  Dealing with the legal system is already a nightmare but this process doesn't have to be unnecessarily painful - Anthony was responsive and very informative about how the process would play out, and he was also very realistic with what he could and could not get done, given context of the situation and what information he had available to him.  I probably called about 7 different lawyers before him and a few after him, but truly each time it felt just a little bit "off."  If you are reading this and in a similar situation, I still think it's necessary to call and ask as many as you can manage - multiple opinions are necessary, find the lawyer that fits with YOU that makes YOU comfortable.  But once you understand the process and what to expect, you need to be decisive and move forward - and it was Anthony's assurance and insightfulness that gave me the comfort to move forward, which none of the others that I had talked to prior or after were able to provide to me fully.    And of course, an honorable mention to Monica for providing guidelines and helping with all of the details along the way.

It's a year later and we are now working to get the case sealed so that I can go back to a normal life.  There's a way to go still but redemption is for anyone who seeks it.  If given the choice to choose differently I would still pick Anthony and Monica.

reviews.text: Conor is the most professional attorney we have ever worked with. He has assisted our risk management and consultation firm with multiple endeavors. Each time we have found him responsive, reliable, detail oriented, and there when we needed him. We will be using his services for the foreseeable future and highly recommend him and his team.

I recently had the misfortune of being involved in a car accident that left me feeling overwhelmed and uncertain about what steps to take next. Thankfully, I was referred to Conor Stanton at Stanton Law Injury Attorneys, and I cannot express enough gratitude for the exceptional legal support he provided during this challenging time.

From the moment I reached out to Conor, I was struck by his professionalism, compassion, and dedication to helping me navigate the complexities of my situation. He took the time to listen to my concerns, thoroughly explained my legal rights, and outlined a clear strategy for pursuing compensation for my injuries.

Throughout the entire process, Conor and his team demonstrated an unwavering commitment to my case. They were always accessible, promptly responding to any questions or concerns I had and keeping me updated on the progress of my case every step of the way. Their attention to detail and expertise in personal injury law gave me confidence that my case was in the best possible hands.

Thanks to Conor's tenacity and expertise, I was able to secure a settlement that far exceeded my expectations. Not only did he help me obtain the financial compensation I deserved for my medical bills and lost wages, but he also provided invaluable support and guidance that made the entire process as stress-free as possible.

I cannot recommend Conor Stanton and Stanton Law Injury Attorneys highly enough. If you find yourself in need of a dedicated and experienced personal injury lawyer who will fight tirelessly on your behalf, look no further than Conor Stanton. He truly is the gold standard in his field, and I am forever grateful for his assistance during one of the most challenging times in my life.

I'm so glad that I opted to work with California lawyers group. Karla worked with me hands on and kept me in the loop every step of the way. I am very grateful to California Lawyers Group, Inc. They are very professional people who guided the process step by step with dedication and comfort at all times.
I gladly recommend them.

Love love love!!! They helped with a case that was going cold, my insurance didn’t help me at all after my accident and had me waiting for a year for something to happen. The staff was very helpful! Thanks to the team for settling my auto collision case! I appreciate you all.

I had the privilege to work with Micheal Recinos. Micheal is very knowledgeable and professional including all the staff. I highly recommend Rm law group. If i ever had to use a family law attorney it will definitely be them. Thank you Micheal.
I must thank attorney Michael and his team for their great commitment, help, and excellent professional support. I highly recommend RM Law Group to people facing family law issues.

I can not speak highly enough of Jason Martinez and his team. Due to an administrative error, I was asked to pay over $230,000 in arrears for a child support case that was closed for more than 12 years. Jason and the RM Law Group team thoroughly investigated and uncovered all relevant filings from both LA and Orange counties. After a 2 year legal battle, they successfully demonstrated a verbal joint custody agreement that cleared me of all the unjust charges. Keeping me looped in at all steps in the process, I am incredibly grateful for their hard work and highly recommend RM Law Group to anyone facing family law issues.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Antonio, thank you for taking a moment to post your review. We were glad we were able to help in your matter... I know it was a long road, but hopefully you can move forward with more peace. Call us any time you need!

reviews.text:
I cannot express enough gratitude for the
exceptional work done by RM Law.
They not only helped reunite my daughter with me but also worked tirelessly to ensure I received primary custody. From the very beginning, their team demonstrated unparalleled professionalism, compassion, and dedication to my case. They took the time to understand every detail, and their expert guidance made an overwhelming process much easier to navigate. The communication was always clear, timely, and reassuring, which meant the world to me during such an emotional time. I highly recommend Michael Recinos to anyone in need of family law services. They truly make a difference!

Attorney Jason Martinez was absolutely fantastic to me and my family throughout my case. He always considered my bottom dollar throughout the duration of the case and the entire staff was always able to help with whatever questions I had. Attorney Martinez not only “won” my case but assured me and walked me through the entirety of it. I’d recommend this office for ANY and ALL family law needs. There’s nowhere else I’d rather be than with these great folks. 15/10 would recommend for anyone else. My case took years to wrap up and there was never a moment I felt that my wants/needs/voice was going unheard. Definitely the best legal service I’ve ever had!

I cannot express enough gratitude for RM Law Group for guiding my family and me through a challenging two-year custody battle. Their dedication and expertise were evident from day one. While we didn't get everything we asked the courts for, RM Law Group ensured we secured the most critical aspects that truly mattered to us.

The team was always professional, empathetic, and responsive, making a stressful situation much more manageable. Their ability to navigate the complexities of our case and their unwavering support gave us confidence and peace of mind throughout the process.

Thank you, RM Law Group, for your hard work, persistence, and for fighting for the best possible outcome for our family. I highly recommend their services to anyone in need of a reliable and compassionate legal team.

Jason Martinez and the whole group were amazing. I had a very complicated custody case and they all made feel supported every step of the way. The cost was very reasonable, they all had great communication and more than anything showed me great kindness during a difficult time.

I wholeheartedly recommend RM Law Group to anyone facing a similar situation. During my initial consultation with my attorney, Jason Martinez, I was impressed by his professionalism and extensive experience. Despite living in a different state from where my case was being handled in California, the entire team at RM Law Group provided prompt responses and exceptional assistance. Navigating legal matters can be challenging, and it was reassuring to have such capable and empathetic individuals supporting me.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much Tony for your kind words and heartfelt recommendation. We are thrilled to hear about your positive experience with RM Law Group. Should you ever need assistance in the future, please don't hesitate to reach out. Thank you once again for your trust and recommendation.

I was in a daze wondering how and when I would be able to fill out the dozens of documents that needed to be filed, but Aman laid out a clear and cohesive plan that took something incredibly complex and confusing and broke it down into little parts that were much easier for me to understand. If you want a stress free process with an expert in the area of immigration law, Aman’s your guy!

I want to thank Aman and his team. My mother was in a terrible car accident in La Mirada. My friend referred my mother to Aman. I knew he was a good person because he asked about my mom's health first. Throughout the process, Aman was professional and caring.  Please contact Aman if you need help

Aman did an amzing job with my case. He goes above and beyond with what I need. He is empathetic and understands where his customers are coming from. He takes his job very seriously and is very professional.

I was involved in a terrible accident with a big cement truck where the driver hit multiple cars and slide across the fwy, Aman help me get all the help i need for my injuries and very consistent in following up with me every step of the way to make sure i get the help i needed, very easy to communicate with, and on top of everything even doing this difficult time. thanks Aman, if anyone is in an accident he is the guy to call.
He is an amazing lawyer with a personality that is so friendly and easy to talk with.  I am going to recommend him to all my friends and family!

I was in a bad auto accident. I was vehicle 2 in a 4 car auto collision where the at fault driver failed to step on the brakes and slammed into the nearly stopped vehicle behind me at approximately 55 mph, which in turn forced me into the car in front of me. I had previous injuries sustained from a different accident and with 3 other cars involved knew I needed legal assistance. I contacted Aman after being referred by my chiropractor and am so glad I did. The at fault driver was uninsured and jumping through all the hoops even for my own uninsured motorist coverage was a headache. Aman was thorough, compassionate and knowledgeable. He helped me navigate a settlement to ensure that my medical bills were covered and to help me with future treatment. I definitely would recommend his law firm and would use his services again if I was ever unfortunate enough to need them (Hopefully I will never be in need of them again!).

Aman is very fair and pleasant to work with; I highly recommend his services. I was involved in a car accident and he and his team worked tirelessly to make sure I was fully taken care of. Throughout the year process, he made sure I was always kept in the loop with personal phone calls in which he would explain where my case was at so that I could make an informed decision on how to move forward. He was able to negotiate with my chiropractor to reduce their cost by over 60%! Huge thank you to Aman and his team!

Aman helped me through a very grey area when it came to getting taken care of after my car accident. He kept me involved in the entire process and broke everything down for me. I felt well taken care of and well informed throughout the entire process!

I was rear ended on the freeway and had about $10,000 damage to my car. Like most people I at first wanted to handle things myself even though Aman came highly recommended to me. After several days I started having pain in my neck and decided to call Aman. He handled everything and after all was said and done Aman got me an awesome settlement. If you are in an accident do not call one of the "1 800" lawyers as a friend did and regretted it. I highly recommend using Aman if you want someone who cares about you and getting you the best possible outcome.

Aman turned a bad situation into a good experience! He is super detail oriented and well organized. Would highly recommend! Thank you!

reviews.text:
My traffic accident was quite serious, involving numerous vehicles and individuals, making the case quite complex. The legal team was extremely professional and patient, answering all my questions and concerns. As the case progressed, I felt confident they understood how to maximize my compensation. Attorney Wang's team was incredibly trustworthy, calling me every step of the way to explain, update, and provide their best advice.

The process was also incredibly efficient. I knew my case would drag on for years due to non-cooperation from the other vehicles involved and the insurance company that was compensating. Furthermore, with so many victims involved and the perpetrator's insurance being very low, I knew the compensation would be modest. However, Attorney Wang was able to secure a compensation award that tripled my expectations in a very short period of time. I am deeply grateful.

I would also like to thank Tina for her help and guidance. She has excellent communication skills, is incredibly responsible, and patient. She proactively followed up on my case and answered all my questions, ensuring I felt no stress or anxiety while waiting for my compensation.

Thank you again to the legal team for their dedication!

After reading almost all of Attorney Wang's posts on Xiaohongshu, "Zhiming in California," I decisively abandoned the four lawyers I had previously consulted (including one well-known white lawyer). Only through experience can you truly appreciate Attorney Wang Zhiming's professionalism, precision, and the team's Tina's incredible efficiency and meticulousness! In just six months, we not only won the case but also secured even more compensation! Words cannot express my gratitude. In conclusion: Choice determines success or failure! I recently had the unfortunate experience of dealing with Jamal, and I must say it was the worst encounter I've ever had. His unprofessionalism, arrogance, and condescending attitude made the entire process incredibly frustrating and disheartening.

From the beginning, Jamal showed a complete lack of concern for my questions and concerns. It seemed like he was only interested in collecting his paycheck rather than providing me with the help I needed. Whenever I tried to press him for more information, he became extremely disrespectful, which was completely unwarranted.

To make matters worse, Jamal referred me to questionable doctors with questionable licenses. It was clear that he prioritized his own interests over my well-being. When I approached him about the lack of assistance with my unresolved pain, his response was shocking. He callously dismissed my concerns, stating that the lawsuit was solely about my inconvenience, not my pain. It was evident that money was his primary motivation, and my medical needs were of no consequence.

This entire ordeal has been incredibly distressing, and I feel compelled to warn others about the terrible experience I had with Jamal. His unprofessionalism, arrogance, and lack of empathy make him entirely unsuitable for any role where helping others is required. I strongly advise against seeking his services, as I would hate for anyone else to endure the same level of disappointment and frustration that I did.

In conclusion, my encounter with Jamal was a complete disaster. His disregard for my well-being and his unethical practices have left a lasting negative impression. I implore you to seek assistance elsewhere, as there are undoubtedly more competent.

reviews.text: to flee!

We used the services of this law firm (supposedly) specializing in surrogacy. The management process dragged on and on without any progress. Our surrogate mother lost patience and canceled the project.
This agency offered no commercial gesture, meaning that the package paid was for complete support for our project, i.e., prenatal certificates (which, of course, will never be requested...).
Basically, they ask you to pay for a service that doesn't live up to the standard, and even when they fail, they don't take responsibility.
My experience is to avoid it, change before it's too late!!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for sharing your feedback, Benji. We are considered specialists in the field having been admitted to the Academy of Adoption and Assisted Reproductive Attorneys and Academy of California Adoption and ART Attorneys. We are sorry you did not have an ideal experience during your engagement with our firm.  We strive to provide excellent service and support to our clients and worked diligently on your case to try to move the contract to finalization. Unfortunately we do not guarantee that any contract will reach finalization. We explained the reasons for your delays and provided a timeline showing our efforts on the case. We never charge for services before they are needed, and when a parties do not sign a contract or need a second contract, we offer a discount on the parties' next contract. We appreciate your input and will take it into consideration as we continue to improve our services.

reviews.text: I contacted a few law offices before the Law Office of Luz. Money was always the first subject of matter with all the offices I spoked to. I understand those offices are a business, but how is an individual supposed to be comfortable giving their money to someone when a simple question of theirs can’t even be answered. I had a generalized question about the situation my family and I was in. These offices should have some heart in what they do. Thankfully, I came across the Law Office of Luz… The way she greeted me made me feel like a very important client and took consideration for any conditions I had at the time. I am very grateful for finding her. She answered the concerns I had (about my brother being detained by ICE) without even speaking about money or the price it takes for her to represent my brother. After answering my concerns, she clearly informed me of the steps she would take to proceed with my brother’s case, which gave me a lot of comfort. Then, she discussed her pricing and gave me the option of a payment plan because she understood the sudden predicament my family and I was in. There aren’t words to say how appreciative my family and I are to Attorney Luz for helping us obtain the best possible outcome, which was putting a hold to my brother getting deported. He is now released from ICE and working. I will not forget the kindness and patience she gave us. I will also not hesitate to recommend her should the need ever arise for someone because I called a lot of law offices in my area. I started from the law offices I searched off of google to the offices I searched off of yelp. Nearly all the offices I contacted required money for a consultation or to even answer a question of mine. Only two out of all the offices I contacted was able to answer my question. Both offices knew their stuff, however, I chose Attorney Luz because she not only knows her stuff but she also really cares. I could tell from our phone call.

Luz is the best Immigration attorney around. I bother her every day for questions on Immigration Law and she is an open book of knowledge. I refer every single Immigration case I handle to her. Hire her today!

reviews.text:
Review Title: Unethical Business Practices – Proceed with Caution
I am deeply disappointed with this law firm’s repeated failure to pay its vendors in a timely and responsible manner. Despite multiple attempts to resolve outstanding invoices, the firm has consistently delayed payments or ignored them altogether. This behavior not only reflects poorly on their business operations but also raises serious concerns about their professional ethics.
If a lawyer habitually avoids paying those who support their practice, what does that say about their integrity? Legal professionals are held to high ethical standards, and financial responsibility is a key part of that. Clients should ask themselves: Is this the kind of lawyer I want representing me? Are these the ethics I want guiding my legal matters?
A law firm that disregards its obligations to vendors may also cut corners elsewhere. I urge potential clients to do their due diligence and consider whether they can truly trust a firm that operates this way.

reviews.text:
Please reconsider using Sylvia Gonzalez as your attorney . Miss Sylvia Gonzalez handled my case so poorly from beginning to end. The defendants policy was worth $1 million. I did all the treatment that she recommend. to walk away with alot less for my pockets than what was discussed from the beginning. She spent 11000 on expert witness without my knowledge. She vaguely said we are already accumulating fees,She hired these witnesses for trial and it never went to trail. With this being my first personal injury case/trial, I have no idea how this stuff works, so I’m assuming that these fees would not need to be paid if we are not going to trial but of course with her lack of communication she never clarifies anything. Once I happen to ask how much of these were and when she told me it was $11,000 out of my portion only I said well we might as well go to trial since I have already paid for all of these witnesses. She then told me that she would drop my case and leave me without representation 19 calendar days before my scheduled trial date. If i had too seek new representation i would have a lien placed on the case which will discourage any other attorney to take it, on top of the 11k that she NEVER told me about until i agreed to settle. I feel completely ripped off by her. I also found it weird that everything she did was verbal until the very end she wanted to start having everything in writing.
In the end, she did cut her fees down a tad bit, but of course ,She made over 50k because our case involved 3 ppl she got more money than we did combined. Stay away and go with an attorney who is willing to fight the whole fight not just until they are ready to call it quits mind you, I was rear ended by a landscaping company liability was never an issue. Trust me use a different attorney.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for sharing your feedback. I am truly sorry to hear that you are dissatisfied with your experience. Legal matters, especially personal injury cases, can be stressful and our goal is always to ease that burden, while pursuing the best possible result. While we cannot discuss case specifics publicly, please know that our team works tirelessly to reach the best results within the limits of the law. At the Law Offices of Sylvia V. Gonzalez, APC our fees are structured to be fair and transparent, and in personal injury matters, we do not get paid unless you do.

I value all feedback and take it seriously, as it allows me to continue improving the way I serve my clients. If you would like to further discuss your concerns, I welcome the opportunity to do so directly.

I never spoke to Sylvia directly, but her office staff (Krystal and Erika) was available, helpful, and respectful with every interaction. I've been hit in car accidents several times during my 20 years of commuting in LA and never hired a lawyer before because I didn't want to make things a fuss and just wanted to get past the incident as quickly as possible. This time, a whole corner of my car shattered all over an intersection while I was going straight on a green light, and the other person gave testimony saying that it was my fault. Even her own insurance company could see that their member who hit me was 100% at fault, but they wanted to settle the case for only $500. Someone I trust referred me to Sylvia, saying that she is honest and gets good results. I'm so thankful I made that call and that Sylvia took my case. Krystal was my main contact and she made all the arrangements to make sure that I got the medical care that my own doctor didn't offer, like ordering an MRI which showed that I had spinal disc bulges in my lower back and lower neck. (Even in more serious accidents in the past, my doctor never ordered an MRI.)

Before hiring Sylvia as my lawyer, I spent so much time and stress trying to talk to 2 insurance companies without accomplishing a lot. Once I handed my case over to Sylvia's staff, they took the burden off me and made all calls and arrangements with the insurance companies and medical professionals. Today, I deposited the settlement check into my bank account and can officially put this difficult year behind me. I am really grateful to God for putting Sylvia's team into my path and I highly recommend her office for car accident injuries.

reviews.text:
"$5000 Paid, No Results, No Accountability"

I hired Caitlin Koestner and paid a $5000 retainer to help with a straightforward custody issue. I am a responsible father with joint custody, simply trying to secure fair parenting time with my son. We were never married, there were no property issues, and no financial entanglements. This was a basic request for shared time.

What I got instead was minimal communication, no court filings made on my behalf, and no progress toward resolution. The response from the attorney after I expressed my frustration was to blame the court and the opposing party, while taking no responsibility for the lack of results. I was presented with an unexpected invoice without warning, even though no substantial legal action had occurred. I was also told to file paperwork myself to continue without her.

This entire experience has been disappointing and disheartening. I came to Caitlin for support in one of the most important battles of my life — the right to be present in my son’s life — and I was left feeling like I had to do it all myself.

If you are a parent seeking real advocacy, honest communication, and someone who will fight for your rights, I strongly suggest looking elsewhere.
Matthew Shahon was great helped me at my low and did a wonderful job representing me. Thank you Matthew ill be in touch should thing's get bad again!

Caitlin and her assistant are absolutely amazing! They are incredibly thorough, detailed, and efficient, leaving no stone unturned. Caitlin’s brilliance shines through in every interaction. She possesses a unique grace, expertly handling business matters while making me feel safe and heard. Their dedication and expertise are truly unmatched. Highly recommend!

I cannot express enough gratitude for Caitlin Coestner's exceptional legal expertise and unwavering support throughout my case. From the outset, Caitlin demonstrated the utmost professionalism and kindness, handling my case with a level of diligence that exceeded my expectations.

Navigating a state change, particularly from California to Florida, is known to be a formidable legal challenge. However, Caitlin not only accepted the challenge but triumphed with remarkable skill and determination. Her legal acumen is truly impressive, and it was evident that she had a deep understanding of the complexities involved.

Caitlin's intelligence and strategic approach to the case were evident at every step. Her fees were reasonable, and she displayed a commendable level of financial responsibility, ensuring that our funds were spent judiciously and conservatively. This conscientious approach set her apart in my experience with legal professionals.

What truly stood out for me was Caitlin's unparalleled ability to listen and comprehend the nuances of our situation. She was the first attorney who not only heard my concerns but genuinely understood them. This level of empathy and understanding translated into her dedicated advocacy for us, and I felt genuinely supported throughout the entire process.

Caitlin consistently went above and beyond, always meticulously prepared and demonstrating a wealth of experience in family law. Her generosity in waiving the remaining balance on my bill is a testament to her commitment to client satisfaction and genuine care for the well-being of those she represents.

In the end, Caitlin delivered the outcome we desired, a testament to her skillful negotiation and legal prowess. I wholeheartedly recommend Caitlin Coestner for anyone seeking a family law attorney who combines expertise with compassion, ensuring that her clients not only receive exceptional legal representation but also a sense of genuine support during challenging times.
We hired Caitlin Koestner back in 2020 to help my sister with her custody issues and ultimately we were very satisfied by how hard Caitlin and the team worked for us.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi Victoria:

Thank you so much for taking the time to leave us a glowing 5-star review! We greatly appreciate your feedback and are thrilled to hear that you were satisfied with the services provided by Caitlin and our dedicated team.

At Koestner & Shahon, we understand that custody issues can be emotionally challenging and require a skilled legal professional to navigate through the complexities of the legal system. We are delighted to know that Caitlin and our team were able to meet your expectations and work diligently on behalf of your sister.

We wish you and your family all the best and hope to have the opportunity to assist you again in the future.

Thanks to their hard work and support, I successfully received my resident visa and, later, my permanent status. Now, I am a United States Citizen. Michael stepped into my life at a moment when I really needed someone on my side and he never once let me down.

He didn’t just handle my case; he looked out for me. He checked on me, guided me, and made sure I was okay every step of the way. I could feel that he genuinely cared, and that meant everything during a time when I felt so vulnerable.

When it came time to fight for my case, Michael fought like someone who actually cared about my future. He pushed for what was fair, and the settlement he won for me lifted a weight I’d been carrying for so long. It gave me breathing room, stability, and peace I honestly didn’t think I’d get back.

"I recently had the pleasure of working with Kevin Humphrey, principal attorney with Humphrey and Associates, and his team, and I must say they exceeded my expectations. As a paralegal with many years of experience, I've seen my fair share of attorneys, but Kevin stands out for his exceptional professionalism, sincerity, and dedication to his clients. I came to Kevin with Humphrey and Associates after being extremely dissatisfied with my previous representation, which was, frankly, horrific.

I had an accepted Worker's Compensation injury, but the insurance company was not providing me with benefits, and my attorney was not doing anything to help my situation. In fact, their approach actually made things worse and didn't provide me with the appropriate treatment. I was frustrated and didn't know where to turn until I reached out to Kevin Humphrey, attorney at law with Humphrey and Associates. He took the time to understand my situation, explained everything clearly, and fought tirelessly to get me the benefits I deserved. He secured not only my back benefits but also current benefits and penalties, and ensured I received great medical treatment for my debilitating injuries. He handled everything in an extremely expedited manner.

His attention to detail and commitment to his clients are truly impressive. The outcome was a great settlement, one that I'm extremely pleased with. I would also like to commend his staff, particularly Andrea, who was always helpful and responsive to my questions and concerns. Kevin and his team represent clients in a variety of legal matters and  I  highly recommend Kevin Humphrey and his team to anyone in need of legal representation.

They're knowledgeable, very compassionate, and will do what is necessary to ensure you receive the best possible outcome. Thank you so much again Kevin for your outstanding representation and everything you've done for me - my husband and I are extremely grateful for all that you have done.

Carlo P. Was the assistant who was assigned to me. I will say on the surface he is convincing. If it wasn't for me doing my own research at the last minute and withdrawing my c&r. Which when I emailed him to let him know that, he called me back within 1 minute after ghosting my previous 2 emails and a no show to the appeals court date. Telling me how it was to late(not knowing I had already done my homework). Long story short I threw out a number that ended up being 55% more than what I was going to agree on previously. Your welcome for the extra $$$ guys. Me not being educated enough or familiar with the process and being able to gauge the insurance companies tone probably left another 55-70% on the table. So thank you guys for that. Bottom line this guy isn't the guy you want negotiating on your behalf or at least he didn't negotiate hard enough on mine and would have left me financially worse than what I ended up with.

Humphrey & Associates got me the medical care I needed immediately and got me even more money than they originally estimated for everything. I would definitely recommend them. There's some room for improvement that I'll outline below, but I didn't want to give fewer stars for that because it was overall a positive experience and a very positive financial outcome.

Background: I hurt myself on the job, quit the job, and then workers comp case was cancelled and I didn't have insurance anymore. I didn't know what to do so I contacted H&A. Within a day they had setup doctors appointments and physical therapy for me.

My biggest concern throughout the process was communication. There were periods of time where I did not hear back from them, didn't know what was happening, didn't know what the next steps were, and wasn't sure if all of these doctors visits were even helping me. On top of that I was in pain and it was just stressful. Rest assured, they WERE hard at work building my case and negotiating with the insurance company etc... Additionally, I'm not a Spanish speaker, and the firm seems to cater to such. I don't mind it, but the also the doctors they sent me to would also leave me messages in Spanish that I didn't understand which was frustrating. But other communication qualms; They said I could always contact them about the case, but I think my "main point of contact" changed at least 3 times from the start to finish of the entire process and sometimes I felt like information fell through the gaps. But the bottom line is, when I did call them they always transferred me to someone who had all of the information on my case and could give me the advice I needed and answer any questions. But unless I checked in I wasn't sure of what was happening or any idea of the trajectory of the case. But every time I did check in everyone was so kind, informed and helpful.

I'm not a litigious person, I've never done anything like this before, but I really feel like after suffering with my injury for so long, they were able to really help me put this chapter of my life behind me as I got surgery and money to make up for the terrible experience and more. My advice would be to just do what they say and trust them. When all was said and done it was clear I was in good hands after all.

I hope I don't ever need to, but I would definitely use them again.

Thanks H&A!

reviews.text: Excellent service. Great advice help me get back some good money. Thanks again

The Law Office of Lawrence Hutchens and I are just wrapping things up with my lemon-law case and my husband and I could not be more grateful to Lawrence and team (Ana and Graham). This fabulous team helped us to win an RV lemon-law lawsuit which we needed to be completed as soon as possible. They encouraged us to take it to mediation which expedited the process immensely. Don’t get me wrong, it was still a long (enough) process but in the end we still got more than we were hoping for, even through mediation, because Lawrence is extremely good at what he does. He is also a friendly, funny, personable and of course professional man. We could not be happier. I’ve learned in the state of California you have a lot more lemon-law rights than you may even realize regarding a lemon car or RV. When you need a reliable team, in business for decades now and one of the OGs (Original Guys) of the RV lemon-law legal industry, reach out to this staff! You will be so glad you did.

It was true! Laurence recovered ALL my money ( and then some) for the car.

Fast forward to my unfortunate experience of having another lemon car, different manufacturer! This time, Michelle handled my case. She was FANTASTIC! Always returned my calls and emails promptly with correct info. Her timeline was exactly as she said regarding the recovery in my case.

Don't even bother interviewing another firm/attorney. It's a waste of your time. The two are The Ones.
